{{Infobox group
| name = Judges
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Judges Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The Judges are a powerful and highly individualistic group of elite entities within the [[Abidan Court]]. Traditionally consisting of seven members, they serve as authoritative figures who oversee vast numbers of worlds and manage the stability of existence. While they often operate independently within their specific areas of expertise, they can act in unison to confront significant threats. Their roles involve making monumental decisions that balance the [[fate]] of countless lives, such as implementing world-spanning quarantines or authorizing programs like the [[Executors]] to remove existential threats. Individual Judges possess immense combat potential and unique specializations, though their specific power levels are kept confidential for security reasons. Notable members include [[Makiel]] (the [[Hound]]), who directs causality and [[fate]]; [[Ozriel]] (the [[Reaper]]), an irreplaceable figure associated with the [[Reaper Division]]; [[Suriel]] (the [[Phoenix]]), who acts as a vital mediator and bridge between other Judges; [[Gadrael]] (the [[Titan]]); [[Razael]] (the [[Wolf]]); [[Zerachiel]] (the [[Fox]]); and [[Telariel]] (the [[Spider]]). The group's authority is so absolute that they can influence the course of individual lives and command respect from even the most formidable beings, though they are occasionally targeted by high-level threats like [[the Mad King]] or specialized hunters.}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Judges]] are members of the [[Abidan Court]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6">''Unsouled'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Judges]] are a type of [[Abidan]] allowed autonomy when responding to spatial or temporal violations.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21">''Blackflame'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The two [[Judges]] took the path in [[Fate]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Judges]] are a group of beings that can be linked across time and space by [[Telariel]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Judges]] have never made an open call like [[Suriel]]'s.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c3">''Reaper'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Judges]] are entities that [[Fiends of Chaos]] are powerful enough to contend with.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15">''Reaper'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Judges]] are responsible for keeping the [[Vroshir]] locked down.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Judges]] are unable to travel directly into the [[Hall of Judgment]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c1">''Dreadgod'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Ozriel]] has hidden from the [[Judges]] for centuries.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Judges]] can only focus their full power on one world at a time.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Judges]] are a group of beings that move to check [[Vroshir]] advances in different Sectors.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Judges]] were engaged in a fight with [[the Mad King]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|There are three [[Judges]] present in the [[Iteration]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22">''Waybound'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Two [[Judges]] arranged for the protection of [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35">''Waybound'', chapter 35</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Judges]] are a group that includes [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37">''Waybound'', chapter 37</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Judges]] are said to retire when their job is finished.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c2">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Judges]] reinforced the stability of the [[Iteration]] with their presence.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
